# Kruda Framework

Kruda is a high-performance Go web framework combining speed with type-safety through Go generics. Module: github.com/go-kruda/kruda. Requires Go 1.24+. Zero external dependencies in core.

## Key APIs

- `kruda.New(opts ...Option) *App` — create app with functional options
- `app.Get/Post/Put/Delete/Patch(path, handler)` — register routes
- `app.Group(prefix) *Group` — route groups with scoped middleware
- `app.Use(middleware...)` — global middleware
- `app.Compile()` — AOT-compile router (called automatically by Listen)
- `app.Listen(addr)` — start server with graceful shutdown
- `Get/Post/Put/Delete/Patch[In, Out](app, path, handler)` — typed generic handlers
- `Resource(app, path, service)` — auto CRUD from ResourceService interface
- `NewContainer()` / `Give/Use/GiveNamed/UseNamed` — DI container
- `NewTestClient(app)` — in-memory test client

## Handler Signatures

```go
// Standard handler
func(c *kruda.Ctx) error

// Typed handler (auto-parse, auto-validate)
func(c *kruda.C[InputStruct]) (*OutputStruct, error)

// Short handler (no error return, for prototyping)
func(c *kruda.C[InputStruct]) *OutputStruct
```

## File Structure

```
*.go              — Core package (App, Router, Context, Config, Error, Handler, Middleware)
*_test.go         — Unit tests (white-box, same package)
*_pbt_test.go     — Property-based tests (testing/quick)
transport/        — Pluggable transport (net/http, Netpoll)
middleware/       — Built-in middleware (logger, recovery, cors, requestid, timeout)
internal/         — Private utilities (bytesconv)
cmd/kruda/        — CLI tool (new, dev, generate, validate)
examples/         — 11 runnable examples
docs/             — VitePress documentation site
```

## Conventions

- Functional options: `WithReadTimeout(30*time.Second)`
- Method chaining on App and Ctx
- MiddlewareFunc = HandlerFunc (type alias)
- sync.Pool for context reuse
- Radix tree router with AOT compilation
- Build tag: `-tags kruda_stdjson` for stdlib JSON

## References

- Full spec: docs/kruda-spec.md
- API docs: docs/api/
- Guides: docs/guide/
- Security: docs/SECURITY.md
